title: HOVUK Color Your Own Easter Mug 300ml with Two Removable Paper Inserts (Printed & Blank) Easter Craft Project for Kids, Stocking Fillers Kids Plastic Drinking Cup
features: DIY Easter Mug: Customers will get 1x mug 300ml with Blank paper & easter scenes inserts for your child to create and then chose which design they would like on their mug. Get creative with this Easter craft project, perfect for children and adults alike.

Size and Material: Easter time mug crafted from high quality plastic & assorted removable inserts from paper material. Mug Outer Dimensions are 10cm x 9.5cm (H x W), Mug Inner Dimensions are 9cm x 8.5cm (H x W) and paper size is 9cm x 26cm (H x W).

Washable: Easter colouring mug is washable (hand wash only), just make sure to remove the paper before washing to preserve the personalized drawing. Not suitable for microwave or dishwasher and hot beverages.

Creative Gift: Not only encourages artistic expression but also results in a functional item that can be used for beverages, wonderful addition to kid collection. Perfect for those "make your own gift" lovers, art parties and school craft activities.

Perfect Holiday Activity: Kids art craft set provides a wonderful holiday activity that can be enjoyed alone or with loved ones. This personalized cup sparks their imagination and creativity and gives them a tangible sense of achievement.
description: 300ml Colour Your Own Easter Mug Craft Project for Kids: Introducing an engaging and creative egg hunt gift designed to captivate the imaginations of young artists. Each box contains a clear plastic cup with 2 colouring paper inserts of different designs. Once completed, pick an insert and detach the mug, place completed design inside the transparent cup and replace mug insert. This delightful item serves as an excellent activity to keep little ones occupied while allowing them to express their artistic flair. Specifications: Materials: Plastic & Paper Mug Outer Dimensions: 10cm x 9.5cm (H x W) Mug Inner Dimensions: 9cm x 8.5cm (H x W) Removable Inserts Size: 9cm x 26cm (H x W) Description: Lightweight, Reusable, Hand wash only, Remove paper insert before washing. 2 colouring strips in each box to create and chose which design they would like on their mug. Not suitable for microwave or dishwasher and hot beverages. Get creative with this Easter craft project, perfect for children and adults alike. Ideal way to keep little ones entertained in the Easter holidays and great for rainy days in. Perfect for creative minds, exciting opportunity for children to unleash their artistic talents. SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: Your satisfaction is our first priority, customer service always stands by for you to provide 100% satisfied service. If you are not happy with this product for any reason feel free to contact us.
